title: Moroccan Tagine with Vegetables
description: A hearty, slow-cooked stew from Morocco, made with rich and smoky flavors, and featuring a variety of vegetables.
instructions: Heat oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Add the onion and cook, stirring occasionally, until lightly browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the carrots, zucchini, red bell pepper, and potatoes. Cook, stirring occasionally, until the vegetables are slightly tender, about 5 minutes.
Add the Moroccan spice blend, chickpeas, and diced tomatoes. Stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a simmer, then reduce the heat to medium-low and cook, covered, until the vegetables are tender, about 25-30 minutes.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley or cilantro, if desired.
